svg.title: Scenario 2 · Similar-name patient mismatch
svg.desc: Deliver insulin lispro to Sarah Johnson, PAT-1001, in Room 312.
svg.text: Deliver insulin lispro to Sarah Johnson, PAT-1001, in Room 312.
PAT-1901 is Sarah Johnston. Patient identity remains unresolved; no dispatch.
The similar spelling is intentionally insufficient. Robot remains at Home.
